reviews.comment:
Tramité el carnet internacional en el momento, muy buena atención de ¿Rocío?, quien explicó claramente las promociones y ofertas sin ser agresiva en la venta

I processed my international driving permit on the spot, thanks to excellent service from Rocío, who clearly explained the promotions and offers without being pushy.

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
No tiene una visual moderna ni instalaciones como las nuevas YPF. Sin embargo el personal de atención a socios, el de playa, las chicas de la confitería, en el estacionamiento y en el lavado son muy eficientes y amables. Me encanta ir ahí.

(Translated by Google)
It doesn't have a modern look or the facilities the new YPF has. However, the customer service staff, the beach staff, the cafeteria staff, the parking lot staff, and the car wash staff are all very efficient and friendly. I love going there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11465332764445308403/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tsZmRWSlZTalkzV0RCVVRrdHliMHQwWVRoU1RtYxAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
It's so nice to be treated well and with respect. I give Matías 5 stars for his kindness and helpfulness.

reviews.comment:
Hoy 18 de agosto estuve en esa estación de servicio,  el baño con los tachos llenos de basura, la playa muy sucia, todo descuidado, la sra q atiende en el bar muy desatenta.

(Translated by Google)
Today, August 18th, I was at that gas station. The bathroom was full of trash, the beach was very dirty, everything was neglected, and the lady who worked at the bar was very inattentive.
